agent_recommendation: The source acceptance packet docs/decision-packets/2026-07-01-acceptance/fig3_trapping_concept_acceptance_packet.json recommended accept_current_generated_export, but also listed defer_for_dogfood as the safe default without an explicit human release decision.
human_note: Do not treat the acceptance packet or this record as release acceptance. This records a distinct defer decision only and preserves accepted, golden, final-artifact, source, export, and publication state unchanged.

follow_up.implementation_slice: Open a bounded dogfood or style-direction slice only; do not set accepted: true, declare a final artifact, mutate source, mutate golden artifacts, or change publication/release state from this record.
